etymology.description: 玉(玉) (yù, "jade") + 玉(玉) (yù, "jade") = Duplication of jade -> stylized as 王 for strings of jade
etymology.interpretation: This character represents a duplication of the jade symbol 玉(玉) (yù, "jade"), indicating strings or pairs of jade. The duplication is stylized as 王 to convey the idea of multiple jade pieces.
etymology.simplification: 玨(珏): The character 珏 is a variant of 玨 used in place of the traditional form; however, they both represent the same concept.
